items.title: $65.9 Million Net-Leased Portfolio 70 DST Fully Subscribed, Strengthening ExchangeRight's Essential Income REIT Pipeline
items.description: PASADENA, Calif., December 16, 2025--ExchangeRight has announced the full subscription of Net-Leased Portfolio 70 DST, reflecting continued demand for the company’s historically recession-resilient net-leased offerings that support the growing acquisition pipeline of ExchangeRight’s Essential Income REIT. The $65.89 million portfolio of net-leased real estate, backed by primarily investment-grade companies operating in necessity-based industries, provides investors with monthly distributions at

items.title: 1 Oversold Stock Primed to Rebound and 2 That Underwhelm
items.description: The past year hasn't been kind to the stocks featured in this article. Each has tumbled to their lowest points in 12 months, leaving investors to decide whether they're witnessing fire sales or falling knives.
